positive: Intricate symmetrical celestial mandala design, featuring interconnected bioluminescent flora and geometric stellar elements. The central pattern is composed of stylized cosmic nebulae merging with sharp, repeating mandalic mandalas and flowing, stylized crescent moons. Use a deep indigo and midnight blue color palette, contrasted heavily with glowing electric cyan, vibrant gold leaf accents, and crisp white lines for separation. The artwork must maintain a clean, graphic silhouette, looking highly suitable for screen printing on apparel. Art Deco influences mixed with modern psychedelic geometry. Flat vector style with subtle gradient glows, perfect central composition, symmetrical, centered.
